anuka (von 1. anu) adj. f. ā
1〉 hinter Etwas her, begierig  P. 5,2,74 .  AK. 3,1,23 .  H. 434 .
— 2〉 abhängig: vācamanukāmātmano 'kuruta  ŚAT. BR. 3,9,1,7. fgg. 
— Vgl. abhika.

results.rendered_html:
anuka a. [anu-kan  P. V. 2. 74 , anukāmayate iti anukaḥ kamitā  Sk. ]
1 Greedy; desirous.
2 Libidinous, lustful (as a lover).
3 Sloping.
